mapper.select:
SELECT ws.WH_SEC_ID secId, ws.WH_SEC_WHID secWhId, wh.WH_NAME secWhName, ws.WH_SEC_QTY secQty, NVL(lot_sum.currentLotCnt, 0) AS secPrevQty, CASE WHEN ws.wh_sec_qty > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(lot_sum.currentLotCnt, 0) / ws.wh_sec_qty * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS secUsageRate, ws.WH_SEC_IMG secImg FROM WH_SEC ws LEFT OUTER JOIN warehouse wh ON wh.WH_ID = ws.WH_SEC_WHID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lot_location.secId AS secId, COUNT(lot_location.lotId) AS currentLotCnt FROM ( SELECT lot.lot_id AS lotId, CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END AS secId FROM lot lot
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId
WHERE lot.lot_status IN (10, 20) AND ( NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0) - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0 ) lot_location GROUP BY lot_location.secId ) lot_sum ON ws.wh_sec_id = lot_sum.secId WHERE upper(ws.WH_SEC_ID) = upper(#{secId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOT WHERE LOT_STATUS IN (10, 20) AND ( (LOT_QC = 'N' AND LOT_BWHSEC = #{secId}) OR (LOT_QC = 'Y' AND LOT_AWHSEC = #{secId}) )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, l.* FROM ( SELECT l.LOT_ID AS lotId, l.LOT_ITEM AS lotItem, i.ITEM_NAME AS lotItemName, l.LOT_VENDOR AS lotVendor, l.LOT_WORK AS lotWork, l.LOT_QTY AS lotQty, l.LOT_CQTY AS loCqty, l.LOT_FQTY AS lotFqty, l.LOT_MFD AS lotMfd, l.LOT_ETW AS lotEtw, l.LOT_EXP AS lotExp, l.LOT_QC AS lotQc, l.LOT_STATUS AS lotStatus, l.LOT_MEMO AS lotMemo, l.LOT_BWHSEC AS lotBwhsec, l.LOT_AWHSEC AS lotAwhsec, i.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType FROM LOT l LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM i on i.ITEM_ID = l.LOT_ITEM WHERE l.LOT_STATUS IN (10, 20) AND ( (l.LOT_QC = 'N' AND l.LOT_BWHSEC = #{secDTO.secId}) OR (l.LOT_QC = 'Y' AND l.LOT_AWHSEC = #{secDTO.secId}) ) ORDER BY l.LOT_ID, l.LOT_EXP ) l WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE RN >= #{page.startRow}
mapper.insert:
SELECT #{secWhId} || '-' || ${secWhId}_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO WH_SEC (WH_SEC_ID, WH_SEC_WHID, WH_SEC_QTY, WH_SEC_USAGE) VALUES (#{secId}, #{secWhId}, #{secQty}, 'Y')
